subsystems.name: delta-kernel
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A hand-rolled, deterministic state engine is the core of governance; its rules are the product.

subsystems.name: aegis-fabric
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A central, multi-tenant service should handle policy and agent approvals for all other services.

subsystems.name: mirofish
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: Specialized tasks like prediction and graph analysis justify their own microservice and dedicated database (Neo4j).

subsystems.name: openclaw
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A dedicated gateway service should handle multi-channel messaging and expose core functions as chat commands.

subsystems.name: mosaic-orchestrator
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: Complex system workflows can be managed by a central orchestrator that calls other specialized microservices.

subsystems.name: inpact
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: The user-facing product should be a simple, clean HTML page, not a complex dashboard.

subsystems.name: code-converter
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: Code transformation is a core capability that deserves its own dedicated AST-based microservice.

subsystems.name: uasc-executor
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A deterministic, profile-driven command execution engine provides a safe, auditable layer for system actions.

subsystems.name: cortex
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: An autonomous agent layer (Ghost Executor) should consume directives from the mind and execute them.

subsystems.name: optogon
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A central 'brain stem' should orchestrate all subsystems through a declarative, path-based, state-machine runtime.

subsystems.name: blueprint-generator
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A dedicated Next.js application should handle the generation of new application blueprints or scaffolds.

subsystems.name: canvas-engine
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A live, editable React clone of any URL can be generated from its visual 'anatomy'.

subsystems.name: mosaic-dashboard
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A unified Next.js dashboard should provide a single pane of glass over all federated microservices.

subsystems.name: atlas-substrate
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: The system's state and rules should be collapsed into a single, auditable database-like repository.

subsystems.name: ws-gateway
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: Real-time UI updates require a dedicated NATS-to-Socket.IO bridge for the event bus.

subsystems.name: crucix
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A dedicated Node.js service is required for specific, yet-to-be-integrated backend functionality.

subsystems.name: perception
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A dedicated service should parse visual page structure into a canonical schema, reusing existing extension infrastructure.

subsystems.name: triangulation
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: A dedicated service should verify UI element labels by triangulating DOM, spatial, and visual signals.

subsystems.name: cognitive-sensor
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: Conversation analysis and mining is a core pipeline that should live in a dedicated Python service.

subsystems.name: ai-exec-pipeline
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: An AI execution pipeline should be scaffolded as a distinct application with a server, client, and pipeline.

subsystems.name: lattice
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: The user experience should be a simple, responsive, single-file HTML view over tree, graph, and time.

subsystems.name: routing-png-substrate
subsystems.doctrine_at_time: Complex logic like state-machine routing tables can be compiled into a portable, fast-lookup PNG.
